arxiv_papers.title: Hands-on PDC in Undergraduate Computing Education
arxiv_papers.snippet: Parallel and Distributed Computing (PDC) is a critical yet conceptually challenging area of the undergraduate computer science curriculum. arxiv_papers.title: Curiosity and Metacognition: Towards a Unified Framework for Learning and Education in the Age of AI
arxiv_papers.snippet: This chapter examines the relationship between curiosity and metacognition as critical drivers of autonomous and self-regulated learning.
